options.tooltip: Update yt-dlp to the latest release before running.
Continue with next video on download errors instead of aborting.
Do not stop the entire playlist when one video fails.
Maximum download rate, e.g. 50K or 4.2M.
Number of retries for HTTP/HTTPS requests (default 10, or infinite when used with --fragment-retries).
Retries for fragment downloads (DASH/hls).
Number of DASH/HLS fragments to download in parallel.
Skip unavailable fragments for DASH/HLS manifests.
Do not use .part files; write directly to the final filename.
Overwrite existing files and do not resume partial downloads (avoids HTTP 416 on stale files).
Extract audio from the downloaded file.
Convert audio to this format (requires -x).
Audio quality for conversion (0=best, 10=worst; or specific bitrate).
Extra arguments for post-processors (e.g. ffmpeg:-threads 8).
Video format selector (e.g. bestvideo+bestaudio, mp4).
Sort formats by fields (e.g. res:1080,codec:h264).
Container format used when merging video and audio.
Remux video to another container if necessary.
Output filename template.
Base directory for downloads (paths home/temp etc.).
Colon-separated list of additional paths for --download-archive etc.
Replace text in metadata fields (FIELD:REGEX:REPLACE).
Write subtitle file if available.
Write automatically generated subtitles.
Languages for subtitles, comma-separated (wildcards allowed).
Embed subtitles in the video (mp4/webm only).
Account username for login (use with --password or netrc).
Account password. Stored in profile on disk — use with care.
Netscape cookie file path for authenticated downloads.
Use .netrc for authentication.
Embed metadata (title, artist, etc.) in the output file.
Embed thumbnail in the output file.
Convert thumbnails to the given format.
Additional post-processor arguments (e.g. Merger+ffmpeg:-c copy).
Proxy URL for HTTP/HTTPS requests (e.g. socks5://127.0.0.1:1080).
Socket timeout in seconds.
Bypass geographic restriction via faking X-Forwarded-For IP.
Two-letter country code for geo bypass.
Generic video filter (e.g. duration > 60).
Stop when a filter is not met instead of rejecting the video.
Archive file to skip already-downloaded videos.
Stop after this many videos are downloaded.
Playlist items to download (e.g. 1-5,7,10-15).
Quiet mode — only print errors.
Verbose mode — print debug output.
Do not download — only simulate.
Do not download the video (metadata only).
SponsorBlock categories to remove (e.g. sponsor,intro).
Seconds to sleep between requests during extraction.
Extractor-specific arguments (KEY:ARGS). Prefer Extra Args for complex values.
